description:
## Parent

Parent epic: `bsm-dbh` — Filtering and search issue list views.

## Background

The active-view search slice introduced a small empty-state signal in `IssueExplorer.tsx`: `IssueListEmptyReason` plus `getIssueListEmptyReason`. That signal is derived from issue-list model inputs, not from JSX rendering:

- active view base collection count (`baseVisibleIssues.length`)
- searched visible row count (`visibleIssues.length`)
- local search query text
- successful load state

Keeping that derivation inside `IssueExplorer.tsx` makes the component own list-state semantics that will grow in the empty-state taxonomy work. The next slice needs true-empty, base-empty, and search-filtered-empty behavior; that should be modeled at a seam that can be unit-tested without rendering the explorer.

## What to build

Extract issue-list derived state out of `IssueExplorer.tsx` into a small model/helper module before expanding the empty-state taxonomy.

Suggested shape:

- Create a focused module such as `src/issues/issue-list-state.ts` (or another clearly named issue-list model file).
- Move the empty reason type and derivation helper into that module.
- Prefer a helper that accepts domain inputs rather than UI component props, e.g. base issue count, visible issue count, and normalized query state.
- Update `IssueExplorer.tsx` to import the helper/type and remain mostly wiring/rendering code.
- Add direct unit tests for the helper so base-empty vs search-filtered-empty behavior is covered without DOM assertions.

## Technical notes

The current implementation lives in the active-view search branch around:

- `src/issues/IssueExplorer.tsx`: `IssueListEmptyReason`
- `src/issues/IssueExplorer.tsx`: `getIssueListEmptyReason`
- `src/issues/IssueExplorer.tsx`: `emptyReason` derivation before rendering `IssueListContent`

This refactor should preserve existing behavior and copy. It should not implement the full empty-state taxonomy itself unless that work has intentionally been merged into this task.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `IssueListEmptyReason` is no longer defined in `IssueExplorer.tsx`.
- [ ] Empty-list reason derivation lives in a focused issue-list model/helper module.
- [ ] `IssueExplorer.tsx` imports the derived-state helper/type and does not contain the base-vs-search-empty decision tree inline.
- [ ] Direct unit tests cover at least: non-empty visible list, base-empty list, and search-filtered-empty list.
- [ ] Existing Issue Explorer behavior and tests continue to pass.
- [ ] The refactor leaves the UI copy unchanged.

## Test Plan

- Add/adjust unit tests for the new issue-list state helper.
- Run `pnpm test`.
- Run `pnpm check`.
- Run `pnpm exec tsc --noEmit`.
title: Extract Issue List derived state from IssueExplorer
